steps.title: Rewrite to match the target form
steps.content: Pull the $\tfrac{1}{4}$ out of the exponent so the outer power is $x$:$$f(x)=(1.84)^{x/4}=\left((1.84)^{1/4}\right)^{x}.$$Set this equal to $\left(1+\tfrac{p}{100}\right)^{x}$ and match the bases:$$1+\frac{p}{100}=(1.84)^{1/4}.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $16$: differs from 16.47 by about 0.47 — closest match.
  • B) $21$: would need $(1.21)^4\approx 1.85$? Actually $1.21^4\approx 2.14$ — too big.
  • C) $46$: $1.46^4\approx 4.54$ — far too big.
  • D) $96$: $1.96^4\approx 14.76$ — far too big.
That matches Choice A — $16$.
